addAdapter(bytes32,address).details: Adds a new swap adapter to the router.

params.adapter: The address of the new adapter contract.
params.id: The unique identifier for the adapter.

constructor.details: Sets up the contract with a vault, fee controller, and EIP-712 domain details.

params._feeController: The address of the FeeController contract.
params._vault: The address of the VaultSpot contract.

eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

executeSwap((address,address,address,uin.details: Executes a swap based on a signed user intent.

params.intent: The SwapIntent struct containing swap details.
params.signature: The EIP-712 signature of the intent.

returns.amountOut: The amount of the output token received.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

removeAdapter(bytes32).details: Removes a swap adapter from the router.

params.id: The unique identifier for the adapter to be removed.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

settleTrade((address,address,address,add.details: This is for internal settlement between users or with an LP.

params.signature: The user's EIP-712 signature for the trade.
params.trade: The MatchedTrade struct with details of the trade.

swap(address,address,uint256,bytes32[],b.details: Executes a swap for the message sender.

params.adapterIds: An array of adapter IDs to try for the swap.
params.amountIn: The amount of the input token.
params.data: Additional data for the swap (flexible for different adapters).
params.tokenIn: The address of the input token.
params.tokenOut: The address of the output token.

returns.amountOut: The amount of the output token received.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

adapterAddressToId(address).notice: Mapping from adapter address to adapter ID.

adapterIdToIndex(bytes32).notice: Mapping from adapter ID to its index in the allAdapters array.

adapters(bytes32).notice: Mapping from adapter ID to adapter instance.

addAdapter(bytes32,address).notice: Can only be called by the owner.

allAdapters(uint256).notice: Array of all adapter IDs for iteration.

executeSwap((address,address,address,uin.notice: This function is designed to be called by a relayer.

feeController().notice: The fee controller for calculating protocol fees.

removeAdapter(bytes32).notice: Can only be called by the owner.

settleTrade((address,address,address,add.notice: Settles a trade that was matched off-chain by a relayer.

swap(address,address,uint256,bytes32[],b.notice: This function allows users to directly interact with the router.

vault().notice: The vault used for asset management.
